common.offline: Currently offline — showing local cached data, changes will be synced when connection is restored.

errors.unknown: An unknown error occurred. Please try again later.
errors.quotaExceeded: System quota exceeded (daily write limit reached). Some features (e.g. import, delete, update) will be temporarily unavailable.

errors.permissionDenied: Insufficient permissions to perform this action.
errors.networkError: Unstable network connection, please check your network status.
errors.invalidCredentials: Incorrect username or password. If you have a custom Email, please use Email to login.
errors.accountLocked: Too many attempts. Account is temporarily locked, please try again later.
